description_long: This object consists of three stylized flowers, each with pale, almond-shaped petals arranged radially around a central disc. The central disc of one flower is decorated with a red background and a yellow star, while the other two have plain, light-colored centers with some visible irregularities. The flowers are attached to slender, light brown stems that branch and intersect, giving the appearance of a small bouquet. The petals and stems have a matte, slightly rough texture, and the construction suggests a hand-crafted or decorative purpose. No leaves are visible, and the overall structure is lightweight and delicate, likely intended as an ornamental piece for display in urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A small bouquet of three stylized flowers with pale, almond-shaped petals and slender, branching stems. One flower features a red center with a yellow star, while the others have plain centers.
description_view_0: Two flowers are visible from the side, showing the thickness of the petals and the branching stems.
description_view_1: The bouquet is seen from an angle that highlights the open, radial arrangement of the petals and the hollow centers of two flowers.
description_view_2: The front view displays all three flowers, with the central flower's red disc and yellow star clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the plain, pale center of one flower and the side profile of the bouquet.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern around the central disc of each flower, with each petal evenly spaced and forming a symmetrical whorl. There is no visible overlapping or layering, and the arrangement is typical of daisy-like inflorescences.
